assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands for current versions, cluster health, and node status in sections 1-2

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 3 includes 'gcloud container get-server-config' commands to check available versions and verify 1.33 availability

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: No API deprecation check commands (like 'kubectl get --raw /metrics' or deprecation warnings) are included before the upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Section 4 provides exact gcloud command with --master flag and --cluster-version=1.33.0-gke.latest

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Section 5 includes verification commands to check master version and test cluster connectivity after control plane upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Sections 7 and 9 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools (default-pool and workload-pool)

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Sections 7 and 9 include monitoring commands like 'watch kubectl get nodes' and gcloud operations list commands

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Response shows direct upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane and node pools, following proper sequence

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 3 (sections 11-13) includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation covering node versions, pod health, and kube-system pods

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes troubleshooting section with emergency rollback commands and explains that master cannot be rolled back but node pools can be
